notes:
Ember 1.9.0 — Ember Link: connect from anywhere

• Ember Link can now be reached from OUTSIDE your Wi-Fi. Pair a device on your Wi-Fi once (enter the PIN as usual) and it's silently upgraded to a long-lived pairing token — after that, the same device reconnects from any network (cellular, another Wi-Fi, anywhere) via a public link.
• Uses an outbound Cloudflare Tunnel (free, no account, nothing opened on your router). Enable it from the Ember Link panel's new 'Connect from anywhere' toggle.
• Security: the short PIN is LAN-only by design — it is never accepted over the public tunnel, only from a real local-network address, so there is nothing for the internet to brute-force. Revoke every paired device any time from the same panel.

Builds on 1.8.x's in-app Terminal + Parallel Agent Tasks + iPad app, the 1.7.x voice/shortcut fixes, and 1.6.0's smarter local Ollama.
